DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided OFAR is deactivated closed.

Note.Para: This provision is not intended to prohibit OFAR inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the overhead flight attendant rest (OFAR) closed (AMM DDG 25-29-02).

ListItem.Para: Remove all baggage and personal items from the OFAR.

Note.Para: Blankets, pillows and other items normally used may remain.

OperationNote.Para: The OFAR is not available for in flight use. Remove personal items and do not enter except for inspections by crew members.

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.
Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided associated OFAR door is removed.
Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871, .

ListItem.Para: OFAR door is verified to open from the outside using the override feature.
OFAR door is verified to open and close normally from the inside.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the OFAR door can be opened from the outside using the override feature, and verify the door opens and closes normally from the inside (AMM DDG 25-29-02).

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided bunk is not occupied.

Note.Para: A bunk with an inoperative or missing restraint system is considered inoperative.
